source: our own error map (where we miss, and where we beat the market)

split.line: Over the last 14 graded games, about 44% of our margin miss is model process we can improve — how we set roles, minutes and matchups — and about 56% is shooting luck, which no model controls.
split.bias_line: On average our call sits about 3.8 points off in one direction: we lean toward the home team.

side.line: We picked the right winner in 10 of 14 games (71.4%).
